summary: W903 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while replacing W902's separate relation-pullback and target-relation-lift provider leaves with the existing W717 relation-data provider. This preserves the W899/W900/W901/W902 endpoint-homology-free closed-map route and keeps W716 boundary data, W722 source triangulation, W856 endpoint facts, and W721 localized-right-adjoint data intact. Product success remains false because the remaining explicit fields, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W903 bundles W902 relation data through W717, but the remaining W903 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

W903 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W903 fields are target-difference surjectivity, target-codomain compactness, selected-difference closed-map components, mapped explicit cokernel closed-map data, strict preimage object fields, strict preimage map fields, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, fixed-target uniqueness obligations, the W716 boundary-data provider, the W717 relation-data provider, the W722 source-triangulation provider, the W856 endpoint topology facts provider, and the W721 localized-right-adjoint data provider.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.

Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
